proposition: Petr Faraga (b. 1966) — sharing the Znojmo address cluster and co-officer history with Václav Faraga (b. 1989) across FaMe logistics and FaMe trade — became a shareholder of Able.cz s.r.o. itself (~0.5%) on 29 July 2025, the same date Václav Faraga was added as a second jednatel of Blackfish & Co.

statusExplanation: Podpořeno více nezávisle vzniklými rodinami zdrojů. Pozor: dvě zrcadla téže autority nejsou nezávislé potvrzení.

sources.title: Czech commercial register — aggregator mirror search (kurzy.cz, rejstrik-firem)

supersededReason: Mixed observation with a family-relationship inference, and materially understated the history: the primary record shows Petr Faraga was a 2012 co-founder and jednatel until 2020. Split into observation + assessment 2026-07-18.
